channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vosloorus family seeks information after spaza shop owner goes missing
item.description: The Kubheka family in Vosloorus has been living in fear since Mazwi Kubheka, a 27-year-old spaza shop owner, disappeared on April 2, 2026. He went missing while on his way to deposit rent money and bu...

item.title: Child Advocates Urge Legislation to Address Online Harm from AI Chatbots and Gaming
item.description: In a recent call to action, child advocacy groups are pushing for the introduction of a comprehensive bill that aims to protect children from online harms related to artificial intelligence (AI) chatb...

item.title: Sindh Governor Assures Family Members of Pakistani Crew Held Hostage by Pirates
item.description: Sindh Governor Syed Muhammad Nehal Hashmi has assured the families of 11 Pakistani crew members kidnapped by pirates after their oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Somalia. In a meeting with the...

item.title: Luis Enrique Confident PSG Ready For Bayern Munich UCL Semi-Final
item.description: PSG coach Luis Enrique don dey full ground confidence as im team dey prepare for big UEFA Champions League semi-final clash against Bayern Munich. As e talk on Monday, April 27, for Paris, Enrique cla...

item.title: Elon Musk Sues OpenAI Over Alleged Mission Shift; Trial Begins
item.description: Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are currently in court over a civil lawsuit filed by Musk in August 2024. The case revolves around Musk's allegations that Altman and OpenAI's COO Greg Brockman bet...

item.title: UQP faces criticism after decision to destroy copies of Indigenous picture book
item.description: The University of Queensland Press (UQP) has sparked significant public debate after announcing it would destroy 5,000 copies of the picture book 'Bila: A River Cycle', written by Wiradjuri poet and a...

item.title: Key Updates on 2026 State Assembly Elections in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry
item.description: The 2026 state assembly elections in India are progressing with keen public attention, particularly in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry. Campaigning for the second phase in West ...

item.title: Salim Dola, key Dawood aide and drug lord, deported to India for further investigation
item.description: Salim Dola, an important associate of notorious gangster Dawood Ibrahim, was deported to India on April 28, 2026, after being detained in Istanbul, Turkey. His deportation followed a coordinated opera...

item.title: Cease struggles as Blue Jays lose to Red Sox 5-0
item.description: Dylan Cease, the Blue Jays pitcher, had a tough outing as the Toronto team lost 5-0 to the Boston Red Sox at Rogers Centre on Monday. Cease started strong, striking out five batters in the first three...

item.title: South Africa urged to support acting police commissioner Dimpane
item.description: The recent appointment of Lt-Gen Puleng Dimpane as acting national police commissioner has sparked considerable debate across South Africa. Critics have questioned her suitability, citing that she is ...

item.title: Key Nigerian Headlines for 28th April 2026: Politics, Security, and Sports Updates
item.description: The 28th of April, 2026, brings a blend of politics, security, and sports stories to the Nigerian news scene. Peter Obi’s recent visit to Goodluck Jonathan is causing waves as it hints at plans for th...

item.title: Australia needs to stay alert to changing threats to abortion access
item.description: Despite significant legal reforms between 2002 and 2023 that removed abortion from criminal statutes across Australia, reproductive rights remain vulnerable. Judy McVey highlights that the global back...

item.title: Calgary pedestrian fatally struck by C-Train downtown
item.description: A pedestrian was tragically struck by a C-Train in downtown Calgary, resulting in a fatality. Details about the incident are still emerging, and local authorities are investigating the circumstances s...

item.title: Dalit Organisations Call Hartal Over Kannur Student's Death, Disrupts Normal Life in Kerala
item.description: On Tuesday, a statewide hartal was observed across Kerala, called by 52 Dalit organisations demanding justice for Nithin Raj, a first-year BDS student at a private dental college in Kannur district wh...

item.title: American Airlines imposes new limits on portable chargers for safety reasons
item.description: American Airlines has updated its policy regarding portable chargers on flights due to safety concerns about lithium batteries catching fire. From Friday, passengers will only be allowed to carry two ...

item.title: Rep. Dan Goldman Calls WHCD Shooting a Security Failure, Disputes Need for White House Ballroom
item.description: During an appearance on Laura Coates Live on CNN, Rep. Dan Goldman (D-NY) commented on the recent shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner (WHCD) held at the Washington Hilton on Ap...

item.title: PNP investigates multiple liabilities in Quezon City patrol car accident
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has announced that more individuals could face legal charges following a patrol car accident in Barangay Payatas, Quezon City, which resulted in the death of five ...

item.title: Coping with Job Loss: Managing Identity, Emotions, and Career Transitions
item.description: Losing a job is more than just a financial problem; it hits your mind and emotions hard. When people suddenly find themselves unemployed, even if it’s not their fault, they often blame themselves, whi...

item.title: Current Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates for April 28th, 2026
item.description: Today, April 28th, 2026, the black market (Aboki FX) Dollar to Naira exchange rate remains a key reference for many Nigerians who dey need forex outside official banks. According to BDC sources in Lag...

item.title: Taylor Swift Seeks Trademark Protection for Voice and Image in Response to AI Concerns
item.description: Pop superstar Taylor Swift has filed paperwork to trademark her voice and image, a move widely interpreted as a proactive response to the growing threat of artificial intelligence (AI) and its potenti...
